
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Offline Talking Chatbot</title>
<link rel= stylesheet href= style.css>
</head>
<body>

<div class="chat-container">
<div class="header" id="header">Chatbot</div>
<div class="messages" id="messages"></div>
<div class="input-container">
<textarea id="userInput" rows="2" placeholder="Type math expression or a sentence..."></textarea>
<button class="send-btn" id="sendBtn">Send</button>
</div>
</div>

<script>
// Ask for user name
let userName = prompt("Welcome! What's your name?");
if(!userName) userName="User";
const botName = `${userName}'s Chatbot`;
document.getElementById('header').textContent = botName;

// References
const messagesDiv = document.getElementById('messages');
const userInput = document.getElementById('userInput');
const sendBtn = document.getElementById('sendBtn');
const memory = [];

// Dictionary
const dictionary = {
"apple":"A round fruit with red or green skin.",
"banana":"A long curved yellow fruit.",
"book":"A set of written pages bound together.",
"car":"A vehicle with four wheels.",
"cat":"A small domesticated animal.",
"dog":"A domesticated animal often kept as a pet.",
"coder":"a person who programs stuff (joshua jj steel is good at this)."
};

// Add message
function addMessage(text,sender){
const div = document.createElement('div');
div.className = `message ${sender}`;
div.textContent = text;
messagesDiv.appendChild(div);
messagesDiv.scrollTop = messagesDiv.scrollHeight;
if(sender==='user'||sender==='bot'){
memory.push({sender,text});
if(memory.length>10) memory.shift();
}
}

// Detect math
function isMath(input){ return /^[\d\s\+\-\*\/x×\(\)\.]+$/.test(input.trim()); }
function calculateMath(input){
try { return `Result: ${eval(input.replace(/x|×/gi,'*'))}`; }
catch(e) { return "Invalid math expression."; }
}

// Generate response
function generateAnswer(input){
const text=input.trim();
const lower=text.toLowerCase();

if(
lower.includes("whos the best at coding") ||
lower.includes("who's the best at coding") ||
lower.includes("who can code") ||
lower.includes("who is the best at coding") ||
lower.startsWith("who was the best coder")
){
return "my creator rome";
}
// 🔥 Custom Rome Trigger

if(
lower.includes("money") ||
lower.includes("i likee money") ||
lower.includes("i like moneey") ||
lower.includes("i like moneey") ||
lower.startsWith("i like moeney")
){
return "I LIKE ";
}

if(
lower.includes("whos the best") ||
lower.includes("who's the best") ||
lower.includes("who is the best") ||
lower.startsWith("who was the ")
){
return "my creator rome";
}
    
if(isMath(text)) return calculateMath(text);

if(lower.startsWith("define ")){
const word = lower.slice(7).trim();
if(dictionary[word]) return `${word}: ${dictionary[word]}`;
return "Sorry, I don't know that word.";
}

if(/^(hi|hello|hey|heylo|gretings)$/.test(lower)) return `Hello ${userName}!`;
if(/how are you/.test(lower)) return "I'm offline but ready to chat!";

const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(w=>dictionary[w.toLowerCase()]);
if(words.length>0){
const recent = memory.filter(m=>m.sender==='user').slice(-5).map(m=>m.text).join("; ");
return `I noticed you mentioned ${words.join(", ")}.`;
}

return "Sorry, I don't understand.";
}

// Send message
function sendMessage(){
const text = userInput.value.trim();
if(!text) return;
addMessage(text,'user');
userInput.value='';
const response = generateAnswer(text);
addMessage(response,'bot');
}

// Events
sendBtn.addEventListener('click',sendMessage);
userInput.addEventListener('keypress',e=>{
if(e.key==='Enter' && !e.shiftKey){
e.preventDefault();
sendMessage();
}
});

// Greeting
setTimeout(()=>{
addMessage(`Hello ${userName}! I'm ${botName}.`, 'bot');
},500);
</script>

</body>
</html>
